name: Mistymon

signature_move.name: Core Dart
signature_move.description: Surrounds its crystal ball with fire and throws it at its enemies.

description: A Magic Warrior Digimon who came from " Witchelny ", the Digital World of another dimension. In addition to mastering various forms of sorcery ( high-level programming language ), it is also a sword wielder and possesses masterful swordsmanship. Extremely well-versed in both chivalry and magic, it can attack by imbuing its sword with magical power. One such technique is its Special Move " Blast Fire ", in which it envelops its sword in flame and then delivers a slash attack with increased power. Also, its " Core Dart ", in which it manipulates crystals freely, is a technique that it skillfully uses for offense and defense.
